name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES state, N, p
(* Type definition for state *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ N ∈ Nat
    /\ N > 0
    /\ state ∈ [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Initial state: all processes idle *)
Init == 
    /\ N = 3
    /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Transition for a single process p *)

    /\ p \in 1..N
    /\ state[p] = "idle" 
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
    \/ state[p] = "trying" 
    /\ \A q \in 1..N : q # p => state[q] # "critical"
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
    \/ state[p] = "critical" 
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Next-state relation: exactly one process changes state *)
Next == 
    \E p \in 1..N : Process(p)

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Mutual exclusion invariant: at most one process in critical *)
MutualExclusionInv == 
    \A p, q \in 1..N : p # q => state[p] # "critical" \/ state[q] # "critical"

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
(* Specification *)
Spec == 
    /\ TypeOK
    /\ Init
    /\ [][Next]_state
    /\ MutualExclusionInv

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, state, messages, votes
PrepareState == "Prepare"
VoteYesState == "VoteYes"
VoteNoState == "VoteNo"
CommitState == "Commit"
AbortState == "Abort"

\* Message types
PrepareMsg(p) == [type |-> "Prepare", from |-> coordinator, to |-> p]
VoteYesMsg(p) == [type |-> "VoteYes", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator]
VoteNoMsg(p) == [type |-> "VoteNo", from |-> p, to |-> coordinator]
CommitMsg == [type |-> "Commit", from |-> coordinator, to |-> "All"]
AbortMsg == [type |-> "Abort", from |-> coordinator, to |-> "All"]

\* Initial state
Init ==
    /\ participants = {1, 2, 3, 4} \* Example set of participants
    /\ coordinator = 0
    /\ state = [i \in participants \cup {coordinator} |-> PrepareState]
    /\ messages = <<>>
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "Pending"]

\* Sending a message
SendMsg(msg) ==
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state, votes>>

\* Receiving a message
ReceiveMsg(msg) ==
    /\ messages' = Remove(messages, msg)
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, coordinator, state, votes>>

\* Coordinator actions
CoordinatorPrepare ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = PrepareState
    /\ \E p \in participants:
        /\ state[p] = PrepareState
        /\ SendMsg(PrepareMsg(p))
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

CoordinatorCollectVotes ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E msg \in messages:
        /\ msg.type = "VoteYes" \/ msg.type = "VoteNo"
        /\ msg.to = coordinator
        /\ ReceiveMsg(msg)
        /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![msg.from] = msg.type]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, state>>

CoordinatorDecide ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "VoteYes"
    /\ SendMsg(CommitMsg)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

CoordinatorAbort ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E p \in participants: votes[p] = "VoteNo"
    /\ SendMsg(AbortMsg)
    /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = AbortState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

\* Participant actions
ParticipantReceivePrepare ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E msg \in messages:
        /\ msg.type = "Prepare"
        /\ msg.to = coordinator
        /\ ReceiveMsg(msg)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

ParticipantVoteYes ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E p \in participants:
        /\ state[p] = PrepareState
        /\ SendMsg(VoteYesMsg(p))
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = VoteYesState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

ParticipantVoteNo ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E p \in participants:
        /\ state[p] = PrepareState
        /\ SendMsg(VoteNoMsg(p))
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = VoteNoState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

ParticipantCommit ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E msg \in messages:
        /\ msg.type = "Commit"
        /\ msg.to = "All"
        /\ ReceiveMsg(msg)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = CommitState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

ParticipantAbort ==
    /\ state[coordinator] = CommitState
    /\ \E msg \in messages:
        /\ msg.type = "Abort"
        /\ msg.to = "All"
        /\ ReceiveMsg(msg)
        /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![coordinator] = AbortState]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes>>

\* Next-state relation
Next ==
    \/ CoordinatorPrepare
    \/ CoordinatorCollectVotes
    \/ CoordinatorDecide
    \/ CoordinatorAbort
    \/ ParticipantReceivePrepare
    \/ ParticipantVoteYes
    \/ ParticipantVoteNo
    \/ ParticipantCommit
    \/ ParticipantAbort

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, coordinator, state, messages, votes>>

\* Type invariant
TypeOK ==
    /\ participants \subseteq Nat
    /\ coordinator \in Nat
    /\ state \in [participants \cup {coordinator} -> {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}]
    /\ messages \in Seq([type -> {"Prepare")
    /\ votes \in [participants -> {"Pending", "VoteYes", "VoteNo"}]

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT N \* Number of philosophers and forks, N

VARIABLES forks, states
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Predicate: philosopher i is hungry and both adjacent forks are free *)
HungryAndFree(i) == /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                    /\ forks[i] = 0
                    /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0

(* Action: philosopher i picks up both forks and starts eating *)
TakeForks(i) == /\ states[i] = "hungry"
                /\ forks[i] = 0
                /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down both forks and goes back to thinking *)
PutForks(i) == /\ states[i] = "eating"
                /\ forks[i] = i
                /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
                /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
                /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
BecomeHungry(i) == /\ states[i] = "thinking"
                   /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
                   /\ forks' = forks

(* Next-state relation: any philosopher may act *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N :
          (TakeForks(i) \/ PutForks(i) \/ BecomeHungry(i))

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant: forks hold 0 or philosopher index; states are valid strings *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
           /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y


VARIABLES num, flag

(* num[i] is the ticket number of process i
   flag[i] is TRUE if process i is choosing a number
*)

(* The set of process identifiers *)
ProcessIds == 1..N

(* Initialization *)
Init ==
  /\ num \in [ProcessIds -> 0]
  /\ flag \in [ProcessIds -> FALSE]

(* Choosing phase: process i sets flag[i] to TRUE *)
Choosing(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = TRUE]
  /\ UNCHANGED num

(* Numbering phase: process i assigns a ticket number *)
Numbering(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = TRUE
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 1 + Max(num[ProcessIds])]
  /\ flag' = [flag EXCEPT ![i] = FALSE]
  /\ UNCHANGED <<>>

(* Entering the critical section: process i checks if it has the smallest ticket *)
Enter(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ num[i] > 0
  /\ \A j \in ProcessIds :
        j /= i
        /\ (num[j] = 0 \/ num[j] > num[i] \/ (num[j] = num[i] /\ j > i))
  /\ UNCHANGED <<num, flag>>

(* Exiting the critical section: process i resets its ticket number *)
Exit(i) ==
  /\ flag[i] = FALSE
  /\ num[i] > 0
  /\ num' = [num EXCEPT ![i] = 0]
  /\ UNCHANGED flag

(* Next-state relation *)
Next ==
  \E i \in ProcessIds :
        Choosing(i)
        \/ Numbering(i)
        \/ Enter(i)
        \/ Exit(i)

(* Specification *)
Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ num \in [ProcessIds -> Nat]
  /\ flag \in [ProcessIds -> BOOLEAN]

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFO ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANT K \* Queue capacity

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* q is a sequence of length K, representing the queue slots.
   head and tail are indices into q (0..K-1).
   size is the number of elements currently in the queue. *)

Init ==
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size = 0
  /\ q = [i \in 0..K-1 |-> 0] \* empty queue

ProducerAction ==
  /\ size < K
  /\ head' = (head + 1) % K
     /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 1] \* produce value 1
     /\ size' = size + 1
     /\ tail' = tail
     /\ head' = head'

ConsumerAction ==
  /\ size > 0
  /\ head' = head
     /\ q' = [q EXCEPT ![head] = 0] \* consume value
     /\ size' = size - 1
     /\ tail' = (tail + 1) % K
     /\ head' = head

Next ==
  \/ ProducerAction
  \/ ConsumerAction

Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK ==
  /\ q \in Seq(K)
  /\ head \in 0..K-1
  /\ tail \in 0..K-1
  /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC
CONSTANTS NULL

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

(* --type definitions-- *)
StateType == {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}
ServerId == 1..3

(* --initialization-- *)
Init ==
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = [s \in ServerId |-> NULL]
  /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]

(* --state transitions-- *)
FollowerToCandidate ==
  /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = s]
  /\ state' = [s \in ServerId |-> "Candidate"]

CandidateToLeader ==
  /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Candidate"]
  /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
  /\ votedFor' = votedFor
  /\ state' = [s \in ServerId |-> "Leader"]

(* --vote request handling-- *)
VoteRequest(s, t, v) ==
  /\ state = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]
  /\ t >= currentTerm
  /\ (votedFor[s] = NULL \/ votedFor[s] = v)
  /\ currentTerm' = t
  /\ votedFor' = [votedFor EXCEPT ![s] = v]
  /\ state' = [s \in ServerId |-> "Follower"]

(* --next state-- *)
Next ==
  \/ FollowerToCandidate
  \/ CandidateToLeader
  \/ \E s \in ServerId : \E t \in Nat : \E v \in ServerId :
        VoteRequest(s, t, v)

(* --specification-- *)
Spec ==
  Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

(* --type invariant-- *)
TypeOK ==
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in [ServerId -> ServerId \cup {NULL}]
  /\ state \in [ServerId -> StateType]

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES readers, writer_active



Init == 
   /\ readers = 0
   /\ writer_active = FALSE

(* Reader acquires lock *)
ReaderAcquire == 
   /\ writer_active = FALSE
   /\ readers' = readers + 1
   /\ writer_active' = writer_active

(* Reader releases lock *)
ReaderRelease == 
   /\ readers > 0
   /\ readers' = readers - 1
   /\ writer_active' = writer_active

(* Writer acquires lock *)
WriterAcquire == 
   /\ writer_active = FALSE
   /\ readers = 0
   /\ writer_active' = TRUE
   /\ readers' = readers

(* Writer releases lock *)
WriterRelease == 
   /\ writer_active = TRUE
   /\ writer_active' = FALSE
   /\ readers' = readers

Next == 
   \/ ReaderAcquire
   \/ ReaderRelease
   \/ WriterAcquire
   \/ WriterRelease

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

TypeOK == 
   /\ readers \in Nat
   /\ writer_active \in BOOLEAN

name: Distributed Snapshot (Chandy-Lamport)
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ChandyLamportSnapshot ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

VARIABLES procState, chanState, markers, recorded
CONSTANTS N, Channels, InitState, InitChanState

\* Helper functions
IsMarkerReceived(i, j) == (i, j) \in markers
HasRecorded(i) == i \in recorded

\* Init: all processes have initial state, no markers received, no recorded states
Init ==
    /\ procState = [i \in 1..N |-> InitState[i]]
    /\ chanState = [c \in Channels |-> InitChanState[c]]
    /\ markers = {}
    /\ recorded = {}

\* SendMarker: process i sends a marker on channel (i,j)
SendMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ IsMarkerReceived(i, j) = FALSE
    /\ markers' = markers \cup {(i, j)}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<procState, chanState, recorded>>

\* ReceiveMarker: process j receives a marker from channel (i,j)
ReceiveMarker(i, j) ==
    /\ IsMarkerReceived(i, j) = FALSE
    /\ markers' = markers \cup {(i, j)}
    /\ IF HasRecorded(j) THEN
           \* Channel state already recorded; no action needed
           UNCHANGED <<procState, chanState, recorded>>

           \* Record local state and channel state
           /\ procState' = [procState EXCEPT ![j] = NewState(j)]
           /\ chanState' = [chanState EXCEPT ![(i, j)] = chanState[(i, j)]]
           /\ recorded' = recorded \cup {j}
           /\ UNCHANGED <<markers>>

\* NewState: placeholder for computing new state of process j
NewState(j) == procState[j] \* (placeholder; actual state update logic omitted)

\* Next: either send a marker or receive a marker
Next ==
    \E i, j \in 1..N : i # j :
        \/ SendMarker(i, j)
        \/ ReceiveMarker(i, j)

\* Spec: system evolves according to Next from Init
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<procState, chanState, markers, recorded>>

\* Type checking invariant
TypeOK ==
    /\ procState \in [1..N -> InitState]
    /\ chanState \in [Channels -> InitChanState]
    /\ markers \subseteq Channels
    /\ recorded \subseteq 1..N

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences

VARIABLES tokenPos, messages

(* Constants *)
CONSTANT N

(* Type definitions *)
TypeOK == /\ tokenPos \in 1..N
          /\ messages \in Seq(1..N)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ tokenPos = 1
        /\ messages = <<>>

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == /\ tokenPos' \in 1..N
        /\ messages' \in Seq(1..N)
        /\ LET nextPos == IF tokenPos = N THEN 1 ELSE tokenPos + 1 IN
           /\ tokenPos' = nextPos
           /\ messages' = IF tokenPos = N THEN <<>> ELSE messages

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<tokenPos, messages>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS Keys, Values
VARIABLES store


(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ Keys \subseteq DOMAIN store
    /\ Values \subseteq {(store)[x] : x \in DOMAIN store}

(* Initial state: all keys map to a special initial value initVal *)
initVal == 0
Init == 
    /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
    /\ store = [k \in Keys |-> initVal]

(* Put operation: updates the value for a key *)
Put(k, v) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ v \in Values
    /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

(* Get operation: reads the value for a key *)
Get(k) == 
    /\ k \in Keys
    /\ store' = store

(* Next-state relation: either a Put or a Get *)
Next == 
    \/ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : Put(k, v)
    \/ \E k \in Keys: Get(k)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_store

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE SingleDecreePaxos ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS N, M, V
VARIABLES accepted, ballot, chosen, decided, promised


(* Helper definitions *)

HighestAccepted(acceptor) ==
    LET acc == accepted[acceptor]
    IN IF acc = {} THEN [value |-> NULL, ballot |-> 0]


ChosenValue(acceptor) ==
    IF decided[acceptor] THEN chosen[acceptor]


(* Initial state *)

Init ==
    /\ ballot = [p \in 1..M |-> 0]
    /\ promised = [a \in 1..N |-> 0]
    /\ accepted = [a \in 1..N |-> {}]
    /\ chosen = [a \in 1..N |-> [value |-> NULL, ballot |-> 0]]
    /\ decided = [a \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

(* Proposer actions *)

Prepare(p) ==
    /\ p \in 1..M
    /\ ballot' = [ballot EXCEPT ![p] = @ + 1]
    /\ promised' = promised
    /\ accepted' = accepted
    /\ chosen' = chosen
    /\ decided' = decided
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen, decided>>

Promise(a, p) ==
    /\ a \in 1..N
    /\ p \in 1..M
    /\ promised' = [promised EXCEPT ![a] = ballot[p]]
    /\ accepted' = accepted
    /\ chosen' = chosen
    /\ decided' = decided
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen, decided>>

Accept(a, p, v) ==
    /\ a \in 1..N
    /\ p \in 1..M
    /\ v \in V
    /\ accepted' = [accepted EXCEPT ![a][ballot[p]] = [value |-> v, ballot |-> ballot[p]]]
    /\ promised' = promised
    /\ chosen' = chosen
    /\ decided' = decided
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen, decided>>

Decide(a, p, v) ==
    /\ a \in 1..N
    /\ p \in 1..M
    /\ v \in V
    /\ chosen' = [chosen EXCEPT ![a] = [value |-> v, ballot |-> ballot[p]]]
    /\ decided' = [decided EXCEPT ![a] = TRUE]
    /\ promised' = promised
    /\ accepted' = accepted
    /\ ballot' = ballot
    /\ UNCHANGED <<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen, decided>>

(* Next-state relation *)

Next ==
    \/ \E p \in 1..M : Prepare(p)
    \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : Promise(a, p)
    \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V : Accept(a, p, v)
    \/ \E a \in 1..N : \E p \in 1..M : \E v \in V : Decide(a, p, v)

(* Specification *)

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<ballot, promised, accepted, chosen, decided>>

(* Invariant: once a value is chosen, it is never changed *)

TypeOK ==
    /\ \A a \in 1..N : chosen[a] \in [value: V, ballot: Nat]
    /\ \A a \in 1..N : decided[a] \in BOOLEAN

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Naturals, Sequences, TLC

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES channelState, fileChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks


(* The file is divided into chunks of size CHUNK_SIZE *)
Init ==
    /\ fileChunks = SubSeq(1..FILE_SIZE, 1, CHUNK_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = 0
    /\ channelState = "idle"

(* Non-deterministic message loss *)
MessageLost ==
    channelState = "idle" /\ channelState' = "idle"

(* Successful transmission of a chunk *)
SendChunk ==
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ retransmitCount' = 0
    /\ channelState' = "idle"

(* Retransmission attempt *)
Retransmit ==
    /\ channelState = "idle"
    /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, Head(fileChunks))
    /\ fileChunks' = Tail(fileChunks)
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ channelState' = "idle"

Next ==
    \/ MessageLost
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ Retransmit

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<fileChunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channelState>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ fileChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq(1..FILE_SIZE)
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ channelState \in {"idle"}

====
